event_name.description: A Meta standard event name (Purchase, AddToCart, PageView, ...) or a custom event name.

event_time.description: Unix timestamp in seconds (GMT) when the event occurred. Must be no more than 7 days in the past; a single older event causes Meta to reject the entire request.

event_id.description: Advertiser-chosen ID used with event_name to deduplicate against browser Pixel events (48-hour window). Must equal the Pixel's eventID for dedup to occur.

event_source_url.description: The browser URL where the event happened. Required for website events.

action_source.description: Where the conversion occurred. When 'website', event_source_url and user_data.client_user_agent are required.

opt_out.description: If true, the event is used for attribution only, not ads optimization.

referrer_url.description: HTTP referrer of the event page.

data_processing_options.description: Set to ['LDU'] to enable Limited Data Use for US privacy compliance; [] to disable.

data_processing_options_country.description: 1 = US, 0 = let Meta geolocate. Required when LDU is set.

data_processing_options_state.description: e.g. 1000 = California, 0 = geolocate. Required when LDU is set and no client_ip_address is provided.

user_data.description: Customer information for matching. At least one identifier is required. PII fields must be SHA256-hashed after normalization.

client_ip_address.description: The user's IPv4/IPv6 address. Do not hash. If the Snowplow IP anonymization enrichment is enabled, this field will contain a truncated IP, which Meta rejects as invalid, causing the request to fail. Do not enable IP anonymization on events forwarded to Meta.

client_user_agent.description: The user's browser user agent. Do not hash. Required for website events.

external_id.description: Any unique advertiser user ID. Defaults to the raw Snowplow user_id. Meta recommends SHA256 hashing and also accepts raw values; if you hash, the format must be consistent with what you send on other channels. To hash, wrap the value yourself, e.g. hash(event.user_id, 'sha256'). To use a fallback identifier, coalesce: event.user_id || event.domain_userid.

em.description: Email, SHA256-hashed after trimming whitespace and lowercasing. No canonical Snowplow source; map from your own entity, e.g. hash(myEmail.trim().toLowerCase(), 'sha256').

ph.description: Phone, SHA256-hashed after normalizing to digits only with country code, no leading zeros or symbols.

fn.description: First name, SHA256-hashed after lowercasing, punctuation removed (UTF-8 for special characters).

ln.description: Last name, SHA256-hashed, same normalization as fn.

ge.description: Gender as single lowercase initial ('f'/'m'), SHA256-hashed.

db.description: Date of birth as YYYYMMDD, SHA256-hashed.

ct.description: City, lowercase with no punctuation or spaces, SHA256-hashed.

st.description: State as 2-character lowercase ANSI code (US), SHA256-hashed.

zp.description: Zip/postcode, lowercase, no spaces or dashes, first 5 digits for US, SHA256-hashed.

country.description: Country as lowercase ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code, SHA256-hashed.

fbc.description: Meta click ID (format fb.1.{ms_timestamp}.{fbclid}). Do not hash. Default reads the _fbc cookie via the cookie extractor enrichment, falling back to deriving from fbclid via the campaign attribution enrichment. For the default to work, configure _fbc in the cookie extractor enrichment and fbclid in the campaign attribution enrichment.

fbp.description: Meta browser ID from the _fbp cookie. Do not hash. Default reads the _fbp cookie via the cookie extractor enrichment. For the default to work, configure _fbp in the cookie extractor enrichment.

subscription_id.description: Subscription ID for this user. Do not hash.

lead_id.description: Lead ID from Meta Lead Ads. Integer - do not string-coerce. Do not hash.

fb_login_id.description: App-scoped Facebook Login ID. Integer - do not string-coerce. Do not hash.

custom_data.description: Additional business data. Must never carry raw PII - identifiers belong in (hashed) user_data.

value.description: Monetary value of the event. Required (with currency) for Purchase events.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Required with value for Purchase events.

content_ids.description: Product IDs associated with the event.

content_type.description: Either 'product' or 'product_group', matching how content_ids are keyed in your catalog.

content_name.description: Name of the page or product.

content_category.description: Category of the page or product.

contents.description: Per-item detail. Each entry requires an id; delivery_category must be one of in_store, curbside, home_delivery.

num_items.description: Number of items in a checkout/purchase.

search_string.description: Search query string for Search events.
